author: xinlingfeiwu
title: app/ layer systematically bypasses engine facades — 57 private imports
notes: All factual claims verified: exactly 57 private imports from app/ into engine._* modules, with per-package breakdown (_work_queue:24, _scoring:15, _state:11, _plan:7) matching perfectly. Only engine/plan.py exists as a facade; no facades for _work_queue, _scoring, or _state. Minor inaccuracy: claims 42 legitimate engine.plan imports, actual is 33. The sentence 'The same file imports engine.plan 42 times' conflates file-level and codebase-level counts. Real architectural observation but common in Python internal tools. S235 by @demithras covers similar ground (broader scope including intelligence/) but was submitted a day later — S034 has priority.
